name: Potatoes with Parsley Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in their skins until tender but still firm.
2. Once cool enough to handle, quarter them lengthwise and slice into 1/2-inch thick pieces.
3. Place sauce ingredients in a food processor and process until smooth and thick.
4. Toss the sliced potatoes with the prepared parsley sauce.
5. Season to taste.
6. Transfer to a shallow serving dish and sprinkle with poppy seeds.
7. Serve warm.
